meta.title: About Dr. Khaled Ghattass
meta.description: Biography, research, and career of Dr. Khaled Ghattass

hero.description: Cell biologist and expert in human behavior. Author, speaker, and founder of the Al-Warsheh social initiative.

about.entry_1: Cell biologist and expert in human behavior
about.entry_2: Author and speaker — weaving science, art, and philosophy
about.entry_3: Founder of the Al-Warsheh social initiative in Lebanon (2020)
about.entry_4: Trained at Harvard, Cornell, and Stanford — followed by 2M+ across digital platforms
about.bio_paragraph: Dr. Khaled Ghattass is a cell biologist and expert in human behavior who has woven science and art together over a 15-year journey of observing human behavior and influencing communities. As an executive storyteller and poet, Dr. Ghattass works to restore balance to our societies by confronting the misconceptions that negatively shape individuals, families, and communities across the Arab world. Through a distinctive narrative approach, he weaves together science, art, and philosophy to deliver content that fosters critical thinking and calls for positive change. As the founder of the social initiative "Al-Warsheh" in Lebanon, Dr. Ghattass empowers balanced young leaders through art, culture, and science.

page.description: A unique repository of articles by Dr. Khaled Ghattass, accessible thematically and chronologically, reflecting contemporary concerns of self, society, and thought.

meta.title: For Corporations & Institutions
meta.description: Corporate programs designed to develop workplace culture and leadership, delivered by Dr. Khaled Ghattass to private companies and public institutions across the region.

page.description: Dr. Khaled Ghattass offers a suite of corporate programs designed specifically to develop workplace culture and leadership inside organizations. The programs draw on more than 15 years of academic and operational experience inside multinational environments, and on his specialization in human behavior and authentic leadership at universities including Harvard and Stanford.
page.approach_text: His programs are distinctive for blending science with humanity — using a unique method that combines storytelling, lived experience, and a deep understanding of human nature, calibrated for Arab culture and the realities of the modern workplace.

trust.heading: Working with leading organizations

meta.title: Reconsider Course — An Eight-Week Cohort in Thinking and Writing
meta.description: An intensive online cohort with Dr. Khaled Ghattass. Eight weeks of writing, reflection, and weekly meetings with a small group of readers.

reconsider.label: 02 — Course
reconsider.title: Reconsider
reconsider.name: Reconsider
reconsider.tagline: An eight-week, deep-work cohort in thinking, writing, and methodical reflection.
reconsider.positioning: Not lectures to be heard once and forgotten. Reconsider is a working room. You meet weekly with Dr. Khaled and a small group, and you leave each session with a piece of writing of your own.
reconsider.panel_reserve_foot: Secure payment via Stripe — sign-in required
reconsider.panel_join_waitlist_foot: We'll notify you if a seat opens up
reconsider.closed_body: Register your interest, and we'll notify you the moment the next cohort opens.

newsletter.statement: I do not write a newsletter to market. I write it because I want our conversation to continue through the week, even when we do not meet. One essay, a small letter, plenty of meaning.
newsletter.privacy: No ads. I will never share your address. Unsubscribe any time.
newsletter.readers: Read by a million across platforms
newsletter.success_copy: I have your address. Thank you — I'll see you next week.

footer.description: A curated archive of Dr. Khaled Ghattass's thought between science, art, and philosophy — books, lectures, and the Al-Warsheh social initiative.
footer.brand_quote: Words are deeds, and ideas are seeds. What we plant remains.

coming_soon.body_books: We're preparing the bookstore with care. Soon you'll find Dr. Khaled's books and recorded lectures available for instant digital delivery.
coming_soon.body_articles: The article archive is being curated. A growing collection of essays on philosophy, psychology, and society will be published here shortly.

coming_soon.body_corporate: The corporate programs page is being prepared. For direct inquiries about leadership, influence, or talent-management programs, please reach out via Team@drkhaledghattass.com.
coming_soon.body_booking: Tour dates, the next Reconsider cohort, and online sessions are being finalized. Booking will open here shortly — for direct inquiries please reach out via Team@drkhaledghattass.com.

session_content.dialog_create_description: Pick a content type, give it a title, and point it at the storage key.
session_content.dialog_edit_description: Update the type, title, or pointer for this item.

session_content.field_storage_key_hint_video: YouTube video ID or full watch/embed URL — the YouTube adapter accepts both.
session_content.field_storage_key_hint_audio: Audio file path or key in the configured storage adapter. A signed URL is minted at playback time.
session_content.field_storage_key_hint_pdf: PDF file path or key in the configured storage adapter. A signed URL is minted at view time.
session_content.field_duration_hint_required: Required for video and audio items so the playlist can show length.

session_content.error_not_found: That item or session no longer exists.
session_content.error_not_session: This product is not a session — only sessions can have content items.
session_content.error_validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
session_content.error_duration_required: Duration is required for video and audio items.

upload.deduplicated: Already in the library — reused without re-uploading.
upload.error_size: File is too large — limit is {limit}.
upload.error_network: Network error during upload. Please try again.
upload.error_generic: Couldn't prepare the upload. Please try again.
upload.picker_description: Pick from items already uploaded under {context}.
upload.picker_empty: Nothing here yet — upload your first file to start the library.
upload.picker_truncated: Showing the latest {count}. Use search to find older items.

orders.resend_send_failed: Send failed. The order is unchanged; try again in a moment.
orders.resend_preview_only: Email previewed (dev only — no real send configured).
orders.resend_rate_limited: Slow down — too many resends in a short window.
orders.resend_no_email: This order has no customer email on file.
orders.resend_wrong_status: Only PAID or FULFILLED orders can have a receipt re-sent.

confirm.fulfill_description: {email} bought this order ({amount}). Marking it fulfilled records that you've delivered the goods. No charge or refund happens on Stripe.
confirm.refund_description: This will issue a real refund of {amount} back to {email} via Stripe. The customer's card is credited and the action cannot be undone from the panel — only reversed by the customer's bank.
confirm.refund_gift_warning: Heads up: this order originated from a gift. Refunding will revoke the recipient's access to this item.
confirm.cancel_description: Mark the order from {email} ({amount}) as failed. This is a record-keeping action only — no Stripe refund will be issued. Use "Refund" if you also need to return the money.

questions.description: Review user questions, mark them answered, or archive.

table.empty_body: Try a different status or wait for new submissions.

mark_answered.title: Mark as answered
mark_answered.description: Write your reply to the asker. They'll receive an email with the answer and see it in their dashboard.
mark_answered.body_help: Write your full answer here — this is what the asker will read in their email and on their dashboard. Plain text; separate paragraphs with a blank line.
mark_answered.body_floor_hint: Keep going — at least {min} characters before you can send.
mark_answered.reference_help: Optional URL — Instagram reel, YouTube clip, or article. When provided, it becomes a CTA button in the notification email.

archive.title: Archive question
archive.body: "{subject}" will be hidden from the active queue but preserved for audit. The asker will see it as Archived in their dashboard.

revert.body_from_answered: This will clear the answer reference and the answered timestamp on "{subject}".
revert.body_from_archived: This will return "{subject}" to the active queue.

delete.title: Delete permanently
delete.body: "{subject}" cannot be recovered. Use Archive instead unless this is spam.

toast.answered_no_recipient: Marked answered. The asker's account no longer exists, so no email was sent.
toast.answered_email_failed: Marked answered. Email could not be sent — please notify the asker manually.
toast.error_forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.

users.readonly_notice: Role management is restricted to the developer admin. You can browse the list but cannot change roles.

booking_tours.page_description: In-person tours promoted on the public booking page. Booking is handled by external hosts.
booking_tours.empty_body: Create the first tour to advertise on the public booking page.

booking_tour_form.external_booking_url_hint: https://… link to the host site. Leave empty to show "Booking opens soon".
booking_tour_form.is_active_hint: Inactive tours are hidden from the public page.

booking_bookings.page_description: Reconsider course + the eight online sessions. Capacity, state, and pricing.
booking_bookings.empty_body: Create the Reconsider course or an online session to start accepting reservations.

booking_booking_form.max_capacity_hint: Total seats available, including those already booked.
booking_booking_form.max_capacity_edit_hint: Read-only here. Use the Capacity card below to update — the action validates against committed seats.
booking_booking_form.booking_state_edit_hint: Read-only here. Use the Capacity card below to change state.
booking_booking_form.booking_state_revert_hint: Manual revert to OPEN allows new bookings even if previous SOLD_OUT was triggered automatically.
booking_booking_form.is_active_hint: Inactive bookings disappear from public view but existing reservations are preserved.

booking_state_modal.title: Change state
booking_state_modal.revert_warning: Manually re-opening will allow new reservations even though the booking was marked sold-out automatically.

booking_tour_suggestions.page_description: User-submitted city / country requests from the public booking page.
booking_tour_suggestions.aggregate_panel_description: Top requested locations, sorted by suggestion count. Use this to prioritize the next tour roadmap.

booking_interest.page_description: Users who registered interest while a booking was closed or sold out.
booking_interest.bulk_confirm_body: This sets contactedAt = now() on the selected interest rows. They will move out of the Pending filter.

booking_orders.page_description: Stripe-backed payment records for booking purchases.

booking_actions.success_refund_initiated: Refund initiated. State will reflect within a few seconds.
booking_actions.error_validation: Please check the form and try again.
booking_actions.error_db_failed: Save failed. Try again in a moment.
booking_actions.error_has_orders: Cannot delete: this booking has existing orders. Refund or archive (toggle inactive) instead.
booking_actions.error_invalid_refund_target: Only PAID orders with a Stripe payment intent can be refunded.
booking_actions.error_stripe_unconfigured: Stripe is not configured. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and restart the dev server.
booking_actions.error_capacity_below_commitment_body: {committed} seats are already committed ({booked} booked + {holds} on hold). Reduce maxCapacity to at least {committed} or refund existing bookings first.

booking_confirm.delete_tour_body: This removes "{title}" from the database. This action cannot be undone.
booking_confirm.delete_booking_body: This removes "{title}" from the database. Bookings with existing orders cannot be deleted — toggle inactive instead.
booking_confirm.refund_body:
Refund {amount} to {email}? This will:
• Trigger an irreversible Stripe refund
• Decrement bookedCount by 1 (via webhook)
• Set local order status to REFUNDED

The booking's SOLD_OUT state will NOT auto-revert.
booking_confirm.refund_gift_warning: Heads up: this booking originated from a gift. Refunding will revoke the recipient's seat.
booking_confirm.purge_body: Delete every booking_orders row with status='PENDING' and createdAt older than 24 hours. These are abandoned Stripe Checkouts that never completed payment.

site_settings.title: Site settings
site_settings.subtitle: Operational toggles for the public site — homepage sections, navigation, footer, hero CTAs, featured content, runtime features, maintenance banner, and coming-soon pages. Changes take effect immediately on save.

groups.homepage_desc: Show or hide each section of the homepage. The hero is always visible — the site needs an opening surface.
groups.navigation_desc: Toggle individual nav links across the header, mobile drawer, and bottom bar. Pages added to Coming Soon are hidden automatically.
groups.footer_desc: Toggle blocks of the global footer.
groups.hero_ctas_desc: Show or hide the buttons under the hero. Hide both for a quieter opener.
groups.featured_desc: Pin a specific item to lead each homepage section. Default uses the first published item.
groups.features_desc: Top-level switches that affect site behavior, not just visual layout.
groups.dashboard_desc: Visibility controls for tabs in the customer-facing /dashboard. Routes still resolve via direct URL when hidden.
groups.gifts_desc: Phase D — gift feature toggles. Disable user-to-user gifting site-wide as a kill switch, or hide the public Send-a-gift link from the header nav.
groups.maintenance_desc: Shown when Maintenance mode is on. Leave fields empty to use the default message.
groups.coming_soon_desc: Selected pages show a Coming Soon screen instead of their content and are excluded from the sitemap. The link still appears in navigation — use the Navigation toggles above if you want to hide it.

homepage.show_hero_desc: The site's opening section. Cannot be hidden.

navigation.show_nav_send_gift_desc: Show the public "Send a gift" entry in the header nav and footer. Default OFF — toggle on once gifting is launched.
navigation.bottom_nav_note: The mobile bottom bar mirrors these toggles automatically.

footer.show_footer_brand_desc: Editorial signature line in the footer

featured.default_hint: Empty = use the first published item from the database.

features.auth_enabled_desc: Show Sign In / Sign Up in the public navigation.
features.newsletter_form_enabled_desc: Allow new subscribers to submit the form.
features.maintenance_mode_desc: Show a site-wide banner above all pages.

dashboard.show_account_tab_desc: The dashboard's landing page (profile editor + bio). Cannot be hidden — users always need a path back to their own info.
dashboard.show_library_tab_desc: Show the Library tab (purchased books + sessions). The /dashboard/library route stays accessible when hidden.
dashboard.show_bookings_tab_desc: Show the Bookings tab (confirmed cohort sessions and courses). The /dashboard/bookings route stays accessible when hidden.
dashboard.show_ask_tab_desc: Show the Ask tab in the customer dashboard nav. The /dashboard/ask route stays accessible via direct URL even when hidden.
dashboard.show_tests_tab_desc: Show the Tests tab (the user's test history) in the customer dashboard nav. The /dashboard/tests route stays accessible via direct URL even when hidden.
dashboard.show_gifts_tab_desc: Show the Gifts tab (sent + received gifts) in the customer dashboard nav. The /dashboard/gifts route stays accessible via direct URL even when hidden.
dashboard.show_settings_tab_desc: Show the Settings tab (preferences, account deletion). The /dashboard/settings route stays accessible when hidden.

gifts.allow_user_to_user_desc: Master kill-switch for /gifts/send (sender pays Stripe to gift another user). Admin grants via /admin/gifts/new are unaffected.

maintenance.until_hint: Optional. Appended to the banner as "Until <date>".

site_settings.reset_confirm_body: Every toggle and selector will return to its default value. This cannot be undone.

list.heading: Tests & Quizzes
list.description: Author and review reflection tests, then watch how readers answer.

empty.title: No tests yet
empty.body: Create the first reflection test to start collecting answers.

toast.error_no_questions: Cannot publish a test with no questions.

publish.body_publish: "{title}" will appear in the public catalog and become available to readers.
publish.body_unpublish: "{title}" will be hidden from the public catalog. Existing attempts and historical data are preserved.

delete.title: Delete this test
delete.body: "{title}" will be removed permanently. This deletes {questionCount, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} and {attemptCount, plural, one {# historical attempt} other {# historical attempts}}. This cannot be undone.

removal_warning.title: Confirm removals
removal_warning.body: Saving this change removes {questionCount, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} and {optionCount, plural, one {# option} other {# options}}. {attemptCount, plural, =0 {No historical attempts will be affected.} one {# historical answer will be deleted.} other {# historical answers will be deleted.}}

field.slug_help: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Used in the public URL.
field.slug_warn_changing: Changing the slug breaks any existing public URL or bookmark.
field.cover_image_url_help: Paste a hosted image URL. Optional.
field.display_order_help: Lower numbers appear first in the catalog.
field.is_published_help: Published tests appear in the public catalog and can be taken by readers.

question.heading: Question {n}
question.explanation_help: Optional. Shown to readers after they submit. Use this to share your reasoning.

validation.correct_marked: All questions have a correct answer marked.
validation.translations_complete: All Arabic and English fields filled.
validation.translations_missing: {count, plural, one {# field missing translation} other {# fields missing translation}}

toast.error_slug_taken: That slug is already in use.

errors.exactly_one_correct: Each question must have exactly one correct answer.
errors.min_options: Each question needs at least 2 options.
errors.invalid_slug: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
errors.slug_taken: That slug is already in use.

empty.title: No attempts yet
empty.body: Once readers take this test, the data will appear here.

email_queue.heading: Email queue
email_queue.description: Durable outbox for transactional emails. Failed sends retry on a 1m / 5m / 15m / 1h schedule; rows that exhaust attempts land here for manual review.

modal.retry_body: We'll reset next-attempt-at to now and flip the row back to PENDING. The attempt counter is preserved — if this fails again, it will land back in EXHAUSTED.
modal.mark_failed_body: This is a manual dead-letter — the cron worker will stop retrying this row. The admin can still manually retry from here.

email_queue.pii_note: These rows contain rendered email bodies. Treat with the same sensitivity as customer correspondence.

about_teaser.heading: A life in print and memory
about_teaser.bio_preview_fallback: Cell biologist, behavioral expert, author, lecturer, and founder of Al-Warsheh. For over fifteen years he has built a bridge between science and society, delivering more than a thousand lectures across Lebanon and the Arab world.
about_teaser.affiliation: Founder of Al-Warsheh, a social initiative in Lebanon.

store_showcase.lectures_intro: Lectures in Dr. Khaled's own voice. Bought once, watched any time.

meta.title: Tests — Dr. Khaled Ghattass
meta.description: A space to reflect. I designed these tests to share with you the questions on my mind — in psychology, in behaviour, in the nature of relationships.

hero.title: Dr. Khaled's tests
hero.body_a: I designed these tests to share with you the questions on my mind — in psychology, in behaviour, in the nature of relationships. They are not pass-or-fail tests, and they are not clinical assessments.
hero.body_b: They are a space to think with me. And when many of you answer the same question, I return to the answers and reflect: what binds us? what divides us? That is what I take to my next lecture.
hero.note_body: When you take a test, think before you choose. A quick answer doesn't tell me much — what tells me a lot is what you choose when you slow down. And don't be embarrassed to leave it after a question or two; come back when you're ready.

catalog.empty_title: Dr. Khaled is preparing the first tests.
catalog.empty_body: Check back soon — we'll have something here worth your reflection.

cta.signed_out_heading: Sign in to take this test
cta.signed_out_body: Free to take, your answers are saved to your account so you can come back anytime.
cta.signed_out_secondary: Don't have an account? Create one.
cta.ready_body: No timer, no pressure. Take your time with each question.
cta.taken_title: You took this on {date} and scored {score}.
cta.taken_body: You can review your previous answers or take it again. Both attempts are saved.

meta.title: Ask Dr. Khaled
meta.description: Send a question. He may answer it on his channels.

hero.lede: A quiet space to send your question. Dr. Khaled reads what reaches him with care, and chooses among the questions those he answers through his channels — Instagram videos and stories. His answers are public by nature, but they begin with one question. Like yours.
hero.note_body: Welcome. When you write your question, write it as you would to a friend — clear, honest, close to your life. I don't reply privately to every question, but I read every one. And when I find a question that deserves to be shared, I answer it on my public channels — so the question becomes a lesson for all of us.

guide.title: Before you send
guide.point_one_question: One question is enough — a clear question beats three tangled ones.
guide.point_set_context: Set the context briefly: who you are in this moment, what you've tried.
guide.point_personal_ok: Personal questions are honoured — you can keep your name private.
guide.point_no_clinical: We don't reply to individual medical or clinical advice. We answer meaning, not diagnosis.
guide.foot: When answers come, they're public — a video or a story. That's the nature of this space: your question helps others too.

form.section_sub: Only Dr. Khaled will see this. He may choose to answer it publicly — if so, we'll notify you with the link.
form.subject_placeholder: A short title that summarises what you're asking
form.body_placeholder: Explain the context briefly, then write the question on your mind. The more specific, the deeper the answer.
form.foot_note: By submitting, you agree to the publication terms.
form.error_unauthorized: Please sign in again to send your question.
form.error_validation: Please check your question and try again.
form.error_rate_limited: You've sent too many questions recently. Please wait an hour.

shared.subject_too_short: Please write a short subject (at least 5 characters).

success.title: Your question is with the teacher.
success.body: Dr. Khaled will read it himself. If he chooses to answer publicly, we'll send you a notification with the link. Thank you for your trust.
